subcodes.first_line: ...When giving medical treatment turn to the Blessed Beauty, then follow the dictates of thy heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: در وقت معالجه توجّه بجمال مبارک کن و آنچه بر قلب القا ميشود مجری دار
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
full_text_parts: When giving medical treatment turn to the Blessed Beauty, then follow the dictates of thy heart. Remedy the sick by means of heavenly joy and spiritual exultation, cure the sorely afflicted by imparting to them blissful glad tidings and heal the wounded through His resplendent bestowals. When at the bedside of a patient, cheer and gladden his heart and enrapture his spirit through celestial power. Indeed, such a heavenly breath quickeneth every moldering bone and reviveth the spirit of every sick and ailing one.
